film.title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahin
film.overview: Runaway heiress in search of her beloved falls in love with another man on the way.

dialogues.dialogue: What's the matter? Why're you concerned with my wife's name? Asking my wife her name without taking my permission! Ashamed to talk to a man! Don't be angry. He just asked my name. He didn't say anything else.
dialogues.cause_raw: disrespecting a man by talking to his wife without his permission

dialogues.dialogue: you'd have died. - What's this? - I don't know. Have you no shame calling another's father your Dad? Get this clear, you maybe a big actor on big posters Or if stupid girls chase you..I have always hated you.
dialogues.cause_raw: claiming another's father as his own
